# Dahua / Amcrest / Lorex RTSP paths.
/cam/realmonitor?channel=1&subtype=0	Dahua channel 1 main
/cam/realmonitor?channel=1&subtype=1	Dahua channel 1 sub
/cam/realmonitor?channel=1&subtype=2	Dahua channel 1 extra
/cam/realmonitor	Dahua realmonitor (no params)
/cam/realmonitor?channel=1&subtype=00	Dahua channel 1 subtype 00
/cam/realmonitor?channel=1&subtype=01	Dahua channel 1 subtype 01
